CustomField.description: REFERENCE, PO NUMBER, BOOKING DATE, SCHEDULED DATE, WORKER, SITE, ROTA, JOB ROLE, SHIFT TYPE, START, END, REQUIRED SHIFTS, COMMENTS, CANCELLED, BOOKED BY, Result
CustomField.inlineHelpText: There are 15 headers. To rename any of the header, just list all the headers with renamed values. Default list is: REFERENCE, PO NUMBER, BOOKING DATE, SCHEDULED DATE, WORKER, SITE, ROTA, JOB ROLE, SHIFT TYPE, START, END, REQUIRED SHIFTS, COMMENTS, CANCELLED, BOOKED BY, Result
CustomField.label: Header Columns
